little champs account : i would like to open an account with my son, do u have any product for kids? | unnamed: 3: main

little champs account : yes our product is little champs account. it is designed specifically for minors (individuals below the age of 18 years). a child requires the help of a parental/legal guardian to open this account and avail its facilities. little champs get a debit card and chequebook which is free the first time
little champs account : what are the main features of the little champs account.
little champs account : minimum initial deposit of rs.100/- | unnamed: 1: little champs savings a/c
little champs account : free first chequebook* | unnamed: 1: profit payment | unnamed: 2: profit rate
little champs account : free debit card* (annual/replacement fees apply). this debit card has the following limits | unnamed: 1: semi-annually | unnamed: 2: 0.19
little champs account : daily funds transfer limit: rs.100,000/-
little champs account : daily atm withdrawal limit: rs.25,000/-
little champs account : daily pos limit: rs.50,000/-
little champs account : * for current account only
little champs account : what other value added features does the little champs account have?
little champs account : attractive returns on savings account
little champs account : sms alert service on digital transactions
little champs account : i net banking services
little champs account : free education insurance plan – rs.5,000/- per month for 5 years on savings account & rs.10,000 per month for 5 years on current account in case of death of the guardian
little champs account : what is the account type of little champs account is it saving or current ?
little champs account : this account is offered both in current and savings categories
little champs account : how can the minor operate this account?
little champs account : this account is opened in the name of the minor. however, a minor needs a guardian’s help to avail the account’s facilities
little champs account : a minor can use the account any time – which means he or she can make deposits or take money out at any time with the guardian’s help.
little champs account : what documents are required to open a little champs account.
little champs account : · a photocopy of form-b, birth certificate or student id card (as appropriate) of the minor
little champs account : · a photocopy of any one of the following valid identity documents of the guardian of the minor:
little champs account : 1. computerized national identity card (cnic) issued by nadra
little champs account : 2. national identity card for overseas pakistani (nicop) issued by nadra
little champs account : 3. pakistan origin card (poc) issued by nadra
little champs account : 4. alien registration card (arc) issued by national aliens registration authority (nara), ministry of interior (local currency account only)
little champs account : 5. passport, with a valid visa or any other proof of legal stay along with passport (foreign national individuals only)
little champs account : 6. source of income of guardian

home remittances: what is home remittance ?
home remittances: home remittance service enables remitters to send money from abroad to pakistan instantly, conveniently, and safely through the legal banking channel.
home remittances: what types of inward home remittance products does nust bank offer ?

home remittances: nust offers the following home remittance products to cater to the needs of various home remittance beneficiaries in pakistan: • cash over the counter (coc) payments for walk-in customers • nust account transfer • other bank account transfer via inter bank funds transfer (ibft) & real time gross settlement (rtgs)
home remittances: in which currency will i receive my remittance?
home remittances: all home remittance payments are disbursed in pak rupees.
home remittances: is there any limit on the amount received though nust home remittance?

home remittances: below are the applicable limits: • nust accounts - no limit • other banks accounts - no limit • cash over the counter (coc) transactions - up to pkr 1,000,000/- per transaction and there is no limit of western union coc transactions
home remittances: are there any charges/fee for nust's home remittance service?
home remittances: nust home remittance service is free of charge.
home remittances: are there any tax deductions on home remittances?
home remittances: home remittance service is free of taxes.
home remittances: can i receive remittance in pakistan if i do not have a bank account with any bank?
home remittances: you can receive your home remittance from any of nust 600+ domestic branches nationwide if you have a valid cnic and transaction unique reference no. / pin code.
home remittances: is there any list of branches i can access to get information?
home remittances: the list of nust domestic branches can be viewed from the branch locator available on our corporate website www.nustbank.com .
home remittances: https://nustbank.com/find-us/
home remittances: who should i contact in case i need to lodge a complaint regarding home remittance?

home remittances: for any query/complaint regarding home remittance, you may contact our dedicated remittance service centre at uan# 021-111-000-787. you may also email your queries/complaints at [REDACTED_EMAIL]
home remittances: how can i obtain a proceed realization certificate (prc)/encashment certificate against remittance(s) received? who should i contact?

home remittances: please find below contact details for obtaining a prc and e-prc: • e-prc option is also available at the nust website https://secureportal.nustbank.com/eprc/customer to obtain a system generated prc on your registered email address. • proceeds realization certificate (prc) is issued from nust centralized remittance department. you may contact them at the following email addresses: [REDACTED_EMAIL]
home remittances: can i track my remittance status online?

home remittances: yes, you can view the status of your remittance online through nust remittance tracker by following link https://nustbank.com/services/alternate-delivery-channels/home-remittance-tracking/
home remittances: what are nust's banking hours to avail home remittance services from nust branches?

home remittances: customers can avail home remittance services from nust domestic branches during regular business hours appended below: • monday to thursday: 09:00 am to 05:00 pm • friday: 09:00 am to 05:30 pm • saturday: 09:00 am to 01:30 pm (through selected branches)
home remittances: is it important to declare the purpose of the funds being sent to pakistan?
home remittances: yes, it is mandatory to provide purpose of funds being sent to pakistan.
home remittances: i am a foreign national, can i send money to pakistan?
home remittances: yes, you can.
home remittances: does the pri comes under the laws of state bank or government?
home remittances: it is a joint initiative of state bank of pakistan, ministry of overseas pakistanis and ministry of finance.
home remittances: can the freelance payment be made through pri?
home remittances: yes freelance payments is allowed under specfic arrangemnts with tie-ups with allowed purposes as per sbp guidelines.
home remittances: what conversion rates will be applied on remittance?

home remittances: the same conversion rates will be applied at the time of sending the remittance. affiliated bank or exchange company confirm the conversion rates to sender at the time of sending the remittance.
home remittances: does nust bank has specialized remittance account as per sbp guideline?
home remittances: yes nust has remittance account name as pak wattan remittance account.
home remittances: who can open pak wattan remittance account?
home remittances: a bonafide recipient of home remittance (pri) can open this account.
home remittances: can remittance be sent from anywhere to pakistan?

home remittances: yes, remittance can be sent from around the globe to pakistan through our agent partners like western union, mastercard, dandelion payments (ria) etc. for more information please go through the below link:
home remittances: https://nustbank.com/services-home-remittance-our-partners/
